creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port was deleted because MySQL 5.1 is End-of-Life (according to upstream) and no longer supported, for either security or bugfixes. It is a FreeBSD policy to remove these ports.

See the following SVN revision: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/401211

And the following MySQL Documents:

https://www.mysql.com/support/supportedplatforms/database.html
https://www.mysql.com/support/eol-notice.html
